Screening for Contraindications and Precautions 
Immunize.org publishes screening checklists to screen patients for contraindications and precautions before vaccine administration. Using these printouts can help prevent adverse reactions. 
Contraindications Screening Checklist for Adults 
Download 
Download 
Contraindications Screening Checklist for Children and Teens 
Download 
Download 
Vaccine Preparation 
Proper preparation is critical for maintaining the integrity of the vaccine during transfer from the vial to the syringe. This is critical for optimizing vaccine benefits and ensuring patient safety. Below you will find videos to help you with vaccine preparation. 
Assemble a Manufacturer-filled Syringe 
Single-dose Vial 
Expiration Date 
Multi-dose
